title: Bridge Essay: Mind-life continuity: A qualitative study of conscious experience.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Formless/Absorption** (Phase 8) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Formless/Absorption to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Mind-life continuity: Aqualitative study of conscious experience.** — Prog Biophys Mol Biol. PMID: 28887143. DOI: 10.1016/j.pbiomolbio.2017.09.004. There are two fundamental models to understanding the phenomenon of natural life. One is the computational model, which is based on the symbolic thinking paradigm. The other is the biological organism model. The common difficulty attributed to these paradigms is that their reductive tools allow the phenomenological aspects of experience to remain hidden behind yes/no responses (behavioral tests), or brain 'pictures' (neuroimaging). Hence, one of the problems regards how to overcome methodologica
